description_long: This hammer features a robust, dark metallic head with a cylindrical striking face on one end and a rounded ball-peen on the other, making it suitable for metalworking and general tasks. The head is securely mounted on a smoothly contoured wooden handle, which displays a natural wood grain pattern and a gentle ergonomic curve for comfortable gripping. The handle is medium brown in color and appears to be made from a single piece of wood, tapering slightly towards the end for better control. The metal head is solid black, with a matte to semi-gloss finish, and shows no visible signs of wear or damage. There are no visible brand markings, logos, or additional attachments on the hammer. The overall design is classic and utilitarian, ideal for use in urban garages, workshops, or construction sites.
description: A classic ball-peen hammer with a black metal head and a curved wooden handle, featuring a smooth, ergonomic grip and no visible markings or attachments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the cylindrical black metal head with the ball-peen end visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the hammer head and the ergonomic curve of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's length and the rounded ball-peen end of the head.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the T-shaped profile of the hammer, with both the striking face and ball-peen ends visible.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth, ergonomic shape and visible wood grain, designed for comfortable gripping.
attribute_head_type: Ball-peen hammer head with a cylindrical striking face on one end and a rounded ball-peen on the other, made of black steel.
